name: magiis-playwright-explorer
description: Project-local Codex plugin for exploratory Playwright automation in MAGIIS.

interface.shortDescription: Exploratory browser automation for MAGIIS using Playwright.
interface.longDescription: Project-local plugin for rapid Playwright exploration, selector discovery, screenshots, debugging, and flow prototyping in MAGIIS without replacing the formal test framework.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the carrier portal and capture stable selectors.
Prototype a Playwright flow for a MAGIIS payment screen.
Open a MAGIIS portal and take debug screenshots.
